title: PMS LARGE VINTAGE WATERCAN PLANTER IN COLOUR BOX 3ASSTD
description: LARGE VINTAGE WATERCAN PLANTER - Vintage watering can shape plant pot. This unique vintage watering can planter is great for planting herbs or small flower bunches. Perfect for gardens & balconies. Vintage watering can shape plant pot 3 Assorted colours: green/cream/taupe - Random colour will be sent. Add style to your garden. Length: 19cm x Width: 14cm x Height: 17cm
